import { mergeMap } from './mergeMap'; import { isFunction } from '../util/isFunction'; export function mergeMapTo(innerObservable, resultSelector, concurrent = Infinity) { if (isFunction(resultSelector)) { return mergeMap(() => innerObservable, resultSelector, concurrent); } if (typeof resultSelector === 'number') { concurrent = resultSelector; } return mergeMap(() => innerObservable, concurrent); } //# sourceMappingURL=mergeMapTo.js.map
